semantic.role: Configuration module defining types and constants for document language selection in multilingual documentation tiers.
responsibilities: Defines the DocumentLanguageChoice interface for language selection options with title, value, and UI state flags.
Provides constant values for default and high-capacity language sets (implied from usage patterns).
Exports separator constants (HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR_VALUE, HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR) for UI grouping of language tiers.
Exports a documentation quality note constant (DOCUMENT_LANGUAGE_QUALITY_NOTE) for user guidance.
outOfScope: CLI command routing or argument parsing.
Pipeline orchestration or task execution logic.
invariants: Must remain a pure data/type definition layer with no side effects or runtime logic.
Must not import from services, core, engines, or infra layers.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized, typed configuration surface for multilingual documentation tier language selection, enabling UI components to render language options with tier-based grouping and quality guidance.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Introduced the DocumentLanguageChoice interface and associated constants to support language selection in documentation tiers, aligning with the tier documentation language selection feature.

English.role: Configuration module defining types and constants for document language selection in multilingual documentation tiers.
responsibilities: Defines the DocumentLanguageChoice interface for language selection options with title, value, and UI state flags.
Provides constant values for default and high-capacity language sets (implied from usage patterns).
Exports separator constants (HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR_VALUE, HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR) for UI grouping of language tiers.
Exports a documentation quality note constant (DOCUMENT_LANGUAGE_QUALITY_NOTE) for user guidance.
outOfScope: CLI command routing or argument parsing.
Pipeline orchestration or task execution logic.

Simplified Chinese.role: 配置模块，定义多语言文档层级中语言选择的类型和常量。
responsibilities: 定义 DocumentLanguageChoice 接口，包含标题、值和 UI 状态标志，用于语言选择选项。
提供默认语言集和高容量语言集的常量值（从使用模式推断）。
导出分隔符常量（HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR_VALUE、HIGH_CAPACITY_LANGUAGE_SEPARATOR），用于 UI 中语言层级的分组。
导出文档质量说明常量（DOCUMENT_LANGUAGE_QUALITY_NOTE），用于用户指导。
outOfScope: CLI 命令路由或参数解析。
管道编排或任务执行逻辑。
